research:schematic/alternate_silica_dist.description: Dev note: Is unlocked by Schematic_Alternate_Quartz_Purified

research:schematic/ficsmas_hits.description:
Festive, right?

Boombox Tapes are automatically added to the Boombox when obtained.

research:schematic/sanctum_2.description: Boombox Tapes are automatically added to the Boombox when obtained.

research:schematic/absolute_ficsit.description:
The most efficient music in the universe.

Boombox Tapes are automatically added to the Boombox when obtained.

research/sulfur_52_hidden.description: Unlocked through Turbo Rifle Ammo research

research:schematic/sanctum.description: Boombox Tapes are automatically added to the Boombox when obtained.

research:schematic/deep_rock_galactic.description: Boombox Tapes are automatically added to the Boombox when obtained.

research:schematic/joel_syntholm.description:
The only music that can legally be listened to while driving around in a FICSIT Factory Cart™.
Anything else is in direct violation of FICSIT Code of Conduct section J-0 paragraph 3-L and will result in eventual extinguishment.

Boombox Tapes are automatically added to the Boombox when obtained.

research:schematic/huntdown.description: Boombox Tapes are automatically added to the Boombox when obtained.

research:schematic/911.description: Unlocks additional features that we don't want to show in the HUB screen.

research:schematic/le_michael.description:
The tape that doesn't need an introduction.

Boombox Tapes are automatically added to the Boombox when obtained.

desc/ficsonium_fuel_rod.description:
Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants.
The power source that put FICSIT on the map. Literally. The crater is still there.

Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

desc/temporal_processor.description: The Neural-Quantum Processor utilizes a combination of neural network architecture and quantum computing techniques to achieve unprecedented performance. This technology has enabled some of FICSIT's biggest advancements in artificial intelligence and relativistic engineering.

desc/packaged_oil_residue.description: Heavy Oil Residue, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles.

desc/plutonium_waste.description:
The by-product of consuming Plutonium Fuel Rods in a Nuclear Power Plant.
Must be stored in a safe location. Handle with caution.

Caution: EXTREMELY Radioactive.

desc/space_elevator_part_11.description:
Project Part #11. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

A large amount of force is required for the Warp Drives to activate, so sticking them to rockets was the logical next step. Additionally, results improved immensely when the observers were further removed from the Warp Drives upon activation.

desc/gold_ingot.description: Smelted from Caterium Ore. Primarily used for advanced electronics.

desc/golf_cart_gold.description:
The one and only Golden FICSIT Factory Cart™

You have now officially ascended. 
Go forth now, Master of Spaghetti, God of the Factory, Sinker of Cups, Employee of the Planet... travel in STYLE!

desc/sam_fluctuator.description:
The SAM Fluctuator is able to regulate and direct the behavior of Reanimated SAM through the application of electric charges with varying frequencies.
This control facilitates technologies such as matter-to-energy conversion and spatiotemporal matter manipulation.

desc/high_speed_connector.description: Connects multiple cables and wires in a very efficient way. Uses a standard pattern, so it has many varied applications.

desc/fireworks_projectile_03.description: Keep away from easily distracted pioneers.

desc/copper_sheet.description:
Used for crafting.
Primarily used for Pipelines due to its high corrosion resistance.

desc/quantum_oscillator.description: An oscillator circuit that uses the mechanical resonance of a vibrating crystal to create a string vibration with a precise frequency. Often used in teleportation technology and dimensional manipulation.

desc/xmas_ball_3.description: An ornament for making FICSMAS Decorations. A slightly dignified copper.

desc/modular_frame_fused.description: A corrosion-resistant, nitride-hardened, highly-robust-yet-lightweight modular frame.

desc/copper_ingot.description: Used for crafting the most basic parts.

desc/ore_bauxite.description: Used to produce Alumina, which can be further refined into the Aluminum Scrap required to produce Aluminum Ingots.

desc/gas_tank.description: Used to package gases and volatile liquids for transportation.

desc/silica.description: Derived from Raw Quartz. Commonly used to create glass structures, in advanced refinement processes, and for alternative production of electronics.

desc/snow.description: This Actual Snow is made from several chemical elements and experiences 100% like naturally occuring snow after extensive user testing.

desc/iron_plate.description:
Used for crafting.
One of the most basic parts.

desc/nitrogen_gas.description: Has a variety of uses, including metallurgy, cooling, and Nitric Acid production. On MASSAGE-2 (AB)b, it can be extracted from underground gas wells.

desc/ore_uranium.description:
A radioactive element. 
Used to produce Encased Uranium Cells for Uranium Fuel Rods.

Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

desc/space_elevator_part_1.description: Project Part #1. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

desc/cartridge_chaos.description: Lightweight, compact, and volatile. These rounds provide extreme capacity and rate of fire at the cost of accuracy.

desc/spiked_rebar.description: Can be shot using the Rebar Gun for self-defense purposes.

desc/ionized_fuel.description:
Fuel that has been ionized, allowing it to deliver incredible output.
Can be used as-is to power Fuel-Powered Generators, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.

desc/compacted_coal.description: A much more efficient alternative to Coal. Used as fuel for vehicles and Coal-Powered Generators.

desc/space_elevator_part_3.description: Project Part #3. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

desc/cyber_wagon.description:
Absolutely indestructible.
Needs no further introduction.

desc/motor.description: Creates a mechanical force that is used to move things from machines to vehicles.

desc/packaged_oil.description: Crude Oil, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles.

desc/ficsite_mesh.description: The Ficsite Trigon, made from Ficsite Ingots, is perfectly shaped for all construction challenges. Its performance is so exceptional, it basically solved structural engineering.

desc/ore_copper.description:
Used for crafting.
A basic resource primarily used for electricity.

desc/truck.description:
Picks up and delivers resources at Truck Stations. This process can be automated. Nicknamed 'The Unit' by FICSIT pioneers because of its massive frame.

Has 48 inventory slots and a built-in Crafting Bench.

Fuel: Any fuel type

desc/stone.description:
Used for crafting.
A basic resource primarily used for stable Foundations.

desc/packaged_nitrogen_gas.description: Nitrogen Gas, packaged for alternative transport.

desc/xmas_ball_4.description: An ornament for making FICSMAS Decorations. An okay iron.

desc/sam.description: Strange Alien Matter, commonly referred to as SAM, doesn't seem to follow the known laws of physics. It whispers of new possibilities.

desc/nitric_acid.description: Produced when Nitrogen Gas reacts with Water. Its high corrosiveness and oxidizing properties make it an excellent choice for refinement and fuel production processes.

desc/xmas_bow.description: A fancy bow. Not for wearing, eating, admiring, Lizard Doggos, humans, aliens, or anything not related to FICSMAS factory production.

desc/space_elevator_part_9.description:
Project Part #9. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.
Power Usage: 500-1500 MW (1000 MW average).

Nuclear Pasta is extremely dense degenerate matter, formed when extreme pressure forces protons and electrons together into neutrons. It is theorized to exist naturally within the crust of neutron stars.

desc/cooling_system.description: Keeps advanced parts and buildings from exceeding efficient temperature levels.

desc/aluminum_scrap.description: Refined from Alumina. Can be smelted into Aluminum Ingots for industrial usage.

desc/crystal.description: A strange slug radiating an unknown weak power.

desc/iron_rod.description:
Used for crafting.
One of the most basic parts.

desc/rotor.description:
Used for crafting.
The moving parts of a motor.

desc/rebar_stunshot.description:
Electrocutes the target on impact, stunning it for a short time.

Stun Duration: 5 seconds

desc/space_elevator_part_10.description:
Project Part #10. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

Years ahead of the competition, this top-of-the-line 3D printer is used for the production of synthetic biological resources.

desc:equipment/candy_cane.description: Self-defense is now not only fun, but also delicious for the target! Do not lick or consume.

desc/space_elevator_part_4.description: Project Part #4. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

desc/alien_protein.description:
Ground-up Alien Remains in a neat little package.
Used for medical purposes and to research alien organisms.

desc/filter.description: Filters out toxins and pollutants from the air when used with a Gas Mask.

desc/heavy_oil_residue.description: A by-product of Plastic and Rubber production. Can be further refined into Fuel and Petroleum Coke.

desc:equipment/shock_shank.description: A standard issue self-defense electroshock melee weapon.

desc/nobelisk_cluster.description: Detonates into multiple smaller explosions. Practical for clearing out large areas of vegetation and other inconveniences.

desc/xmas_ball_1.description: An ornament for making FICSMAS Decorations. An acceptable red.

desc/cartridge_standard.description: Standard issue Rifle ammunition, useful for establishing dominance.

desc/steel_plate_reinforced.description:
Simultaneously utilizes the compressive strength of concrete and the tensile strength of steel.
Mostly used as a stable base for constructing buildings.

desc/ficsonium.description:
Usage and production of this material is strictly prohibited. On Earth, that is. There are no rules in space, only efficiency. 

Power Usage: 500-1500 MW (1000 MW average).
Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

desc/circuit_board_high_speed.description: Controls AIs and keeps them from evolving in malicious ways. Super advanced electronics.

desc/circuit_board.description: Advanced electronics that have a plethora of different uses.

desc/ore_gold.description: Smelted into Caterium Ingots, which are primarily used for advanced electronics.

desc/nut.description:
Consumable

Eat to restore half a health segment.

desc/ore_iron.description:
Used for crafting.
The most essential basic resource.

desc/parachute.description: Slows down your fall when activated in mid-air.

desc/stator.description:
Used for crafting.
The static parts of a motor.

desc/chainsaw.description:
Clears an area of flora that is too difficult to remove by hand.

Fuel: Biofuel

desc/explorer.description:
Traverses rough terrain, including near-vertical surfaces. A fast and nimble exploration vehicle.

Has 12 inventory slots and a built-in Crafting Bench.

Fuel: Any fuel type

desc/battery.description: Primarily used as fuel for Drones and vehicles.

desc/polymer_resin.description: A by-product of Crude Oil refinement into Fuel. Commonly used to manufacture Plastic and Rubber.

desc/locomotive.description:
Moves Freight Cars from station to station.
Requires between 25-110 MW of power to move. 
Must be built on a Railway.

Nicknamed 'Leif' by FICSIT pioneers because of its reliability.

desc/aluminum_casing.description: A versatile container cast from Aluminum Ingots.

desc/freight_wagon.description:
Attaches to an Electric Locomotive or other Freight Car to transport resources. Must be built on a Railway.
Resources are loaded and unloaded at Freight Platforms.
Has a 1600 m³ or 32-slot capacity, depending on whether resources are liquid or solid.

desc/sulfuric_acid.description: Produced by combining Sulfur and Water in a complex reaction. Primarily used in refinement processes and Battery production.

desc/aluminum_plate.description: Used to make products that require high heat conduction or a high specific strength. Thin, lightweight, and highly durable.

desc/spitter_parts.description:
The remains of a plasma-spitting alien creature.
Used for MAM research.

desc/rocket_fuel.description:
A high-impulse compressed gas fuel.
Can be used as-is to power Fuel-Powered Generators, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.

desc:equipment/portable_miner.description:
Automatically extracts a resource when placed on a resource node.
Note: Has limited storage space.

desc/petroleum_coke.description:
Used for crafting.
A carbon-rich material distilled from Heavy Oil Residue. 
Used as a less efficient Coal replacement.

desc/packaged_nitric_acid.description: Nitric Acid, packaged for alternative transport.

desc/dissolved_silica.description:
Silica dissolved in Water, produced as part of the alternative refinement of Raw Quartz.
The Silica can be extracted from the Water to complete the refinement process.

desc/rubber.description: A very flexible material that has a lot of friction.

desc/candy_cane.description:
A delicious Candy Cane to be enjoyed during the FICSMAS Holidays.
*Disclaimer: Not for human consumption...

desc/nobelisk_explosive.description: A simple explosive, useful for clearing boulders, vegetation, and other obstacles.

desc/alumina_solution.description: Dissolved Alumina, extracted from Bauxite. Can be further refined into Aluminum Scrap for Aluminum Ingot production.

desc/gunpowder.description: An explosive powder that is commonly used to produce simple explosives.

desc/sam_ingot.description:
The active and contained form of the Strange Alien Matter.

Proper electromagnetic containment is required, as it appears to be able to manipulate the atomic bonds of any matter it comes into contact with.

desc/golf_cart.description:
The one and only FICSIT Factory Cart™.
Now with special FICSIT-Foundation-only Grip Wheels, for an even smoother and faster factory floor experience!

desc/wire.description:
Used for crafting.
One of the most basic parts.

desc/nobelisk_shockwave.description: Generates a powerful shockwave instead of a regular explosion.

desc/crystal_oscillator.description: An electronic oscillator circuit that uses the mechanical resonance of a vibrating crystal to create an electrical signal with a precise frequency.

desc/turbo_fuel.description: Turbofuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

desc/rebar_gun_projectile.description: An improvised ranged weapon for self-defense. Has to be reloaded after each use.

desc/xmas_star.description: A symbol of appreciation for all the hard work FICSIT has done for its employees. It seems to have an aura of gratitude. Seeing this also means the seasonal event is nearly done, and we can finally get back to Saving The Day.

desc:equipment/zip_line.description:
Provides faster traversal of factories by allowing pioneers to zip along Power lines.
Activate the Zipline and aim at a nearby Power Line to connect to it.

desc/aluminum_ingot.description:
Smelted from Aluminum Scrap, which is refined from Alumina Solution.
Used to produce specialized aluminum-based parts.

desc/space_elevator_part_6.description:
Project Part #7. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

These modular generators use superconducting magnets and vast amounts of electricity to produce a powerful and easily expandable magnetic field.

desc/computer_super.description: The next-gen version of a Computer.

desc/gift.description:
Gifts that have inexplicably fallen from the sky or spawned from a FICSMAS Gift Tree.

Don’t question it—they’re used to produce FICSMAS buildings and parts.

These Gifts are part of the FICSMAS Event, like the calendar in the HUB.

desc/wood.description:
Primarily used as fuel.
Biomass Burners and vehicles can use Wood for power.

desc/time_crystal.description: Time Crystals are Diamonds that have been reconfigured on a sub-atomic level in the Converter to retain a time-periodic self-organizing structure. This allows them to be used in the development of quantum processing and storage technologies.

desc:equipment/hover_pack.description:
Power Consumption: 100 MW

Allows pioneers to move vertically and hover in mid-air to improve building efficiency and factory traversal. Wirelessly connects to nearby power connections, such as Power Poles and Buildings, for power consumption.

Slow-Fall: Hold {PlayerMovement_Jump} after losing connection mid-air.
Disable Hoverpack: Double tap {PlayerMovement_Crouch} while hovering.

desc/iron_plate_reinforced.description:
Used for crafting.
A sturdier and more durable Iron Plate.

desc/space_elevator_part_2.description: Project Part #2. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

desc/crystal_mk_3.description: A strange slug radiating a powerful unknown power.

desc/nobelisk_gas.description: Creates a deadly gas cloud instead of a regular explosion.

desc/stinger_parts.description:
The remains of whatever that creepy thing was.
Used for MAM research.

desc/space_elevator_part_7.description:
Project Part #6. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

This extremely fast and precise computing system is specifically designed to direct the Project Assembly: Assembly Phase.

desc/copper_dust.description:
Ground-up Copper Ingots.
The high natural density of Copper, combined with the granularity of the powder, makes this part perfect for producing Nuclear Pasta in the Particle Accelerator.

desc/dark_matter.description:
Concentrated Dark Matter Residue that is isolated within a crystalline vessel. This form of containment allows for utilising Dark Matter reliably in other production processes.

Power Usage: 500-1500 MW (1000 MW average).

desc/iron_screw.description:
Used for crafting.
One of the most basic parts.

desc:equipment/object_scanner.description: Scans the area for a selected item. Beeps at a rate proportional to proximity and direction.

desc/cartridge_smart_projectile.description:
The bullet guidance system built into this ammunition allows it to accurately hit any target within the reticle area.
Especially useful when dealing with agile threats, or for pioneers who can't be bothered to aim properly.

desc/liquid_biofuel.description: Liquid Biofuel can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles.

desc/iron_ingot.description: Used for crafting the most basic parts.

desc/quartz_crystal.description: Derived from Raw Quartz. Used in the production of advanced radar technology and high-quality display screens.

desc/singularity_cell.description: Used to break down space and time. Required to power Portals.

desc/rebar_explosive.description: Explodes on impact, dealing heavy damage.

desc/hog_parts.description:
The carapace of an alien Hog creature.
Used for MAM research.

desc/coal.description: Mainly used as fuel for vehicles & Coal-Powered Generators, or in Steel production.

desc/sulfur.description: Primarily used to produce Black Powder.

desc/gunpowder_mk_2.description: An explosive powder that is commonly used to produce modern firearms.

desc/fireworks_projectile_02.description: Poses acceptable amount of risk to pioneers.

desc/plutonium_fuel_rod.description:
Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants.

Caution: Produces radioactive Plutonium Waste when consumed.
Caution: HIGHLY Radioactive.

desc/alien_dna_capsule.description:
Translates organic chemicals into readable alien genetic information.
Used for researching alien organisms.

Go the extra kilometer! Knowledge is power, and power is just efficiency with fewer steps. Depositing Alien DNA Capsules in the AWESOME Sink provides FICSIT with knowledge, and pioneers with Coupons.

desc/quantum_energy.description:
Excited Photonic Matter is essential for all production processes in the Quantum Encoder.

Formed in the Converter by inducing intense photon interactions through exposure to SAM in a high-energy environment.

desc/xmas_ball_cluster.description: A collection of FICSMAS ornaments and also an eyesore.

desc/high_speed_wire.description: Caterium's high conductivity and resistance to corrosion make it ideal for small, advanced electronics.

desc/rebar_spreadshot.description: Fractures when shot, launching deadly debris with wide spread but limited range.

desc/berry.description:
Consumable

Eat to restore 1 health segment.

desc/crystal_mk_2.description: A strange slug radiating an unknown power.

desc/steel_pipe.description: Primarily used when constructing slightly more advanced buildings.

desc/generic_biomass.description:
Primarily used as fuel.
Biomass Burners and vehicles can use it for power.
Biomass is much more energy-efficient than raw biological matter.

desc:equipment/jet_pack.description:
Allows pioneers to travel through the air with increased control.

Fuel is automatically consumed from the pioneer's inventory to refill the Jetpack while on the ground.
Different fuel types can be used and provide different levels of Jetpack efficiency. The preferred fuel type will be used if available, and can be set in the equipment inventory.

desc/packaged_biofuel.description: Liquid Biofuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

desc/ficsite_ingot.description:
Produced by reconstructing other metals on a molecular level using Strange Alien Matter.

Synthesized by FICSIT to be the perfect construction material, and used in the most high-end processes.

desc/plastic.description: Versatile and easy to manufacture, this material has a wide range of uses.

desc/liquid_fuel.description: Can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.

desc/liquid_oil.description: Refined into all kinds of Oil-based resources, like Fuel and Plastic.

desc:equipment/jumping_stilts.description:
An exoskeleton for the lower legs that assists movement, allowing pioneers to sprint faster and jump higher.
Also dampens the impact of landing.

desc/shroom.description:
Consumable

Eat to restore 2 health segments.

desc/liquid_turbo_fuel.description: A more efficient alternative to Fuel. Can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles.

desc/space_elevator_part_8.description:
Project Part #8. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

Uses extreme heat to produce the high-pressure plasma required to get Project Assembly into motion.

desc/dark_energy.description:
Produced as a by-product of Quantum Encoding processes and alternatively generated in the Converter.

Various fields of science are still debating the nature and properties of Dark Matter. Meanwhile, FICSIT has found several applications for it in space-time manipulation.

desc/nobelisk_nuke.description:
Uses a nuclear fission reaction to generate a massive explosion.
WARNING: Ensure all FICSIT property is clear of the blast zone before detonation.

desc/biofuel.description: The most energy-efficient form of solid Biomass. Can be used as fuel for the Chainsaw.

desc/uranium_cell.description:
Used to produce Uranium Fuel Rods for Nuclear Power production. Made from Uranium Ore.

Caution: Mildly Radioactive.

desc/snowball_projectile.description: Compressed dihydrogen monoxide crystals for weaponized fun!

desc/motor_lightweight.description: A more complex and powerful version of the regular Motor.

desc/non_fissible_uranium.description:
The Uranium-238 isotope is non-fissile, meaning it cannot be used for nuclear fission. It can, however, be converted into fissile Plutonium in the Particle Accelerator.

Caution: Mildly Radioactive.

desc:equipment/hazmat_suit.description:
Shields pioneers from the adverse effects of radiation. 
Consumes Iodine-Infused Filters from the pioneer's inventory when worn in radioactive areas.

desc/hazmat_filter.description: Absorbs radioactive particles when used with the Hazmat Suit.

desc/xmas_wreath.description: FICSIT's newest holiday innovation: decorations that can be turned into decorations! Efficiency and waste-conscious design at its best.

desc/nuclear_fuel_rod.description:
Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants.

Caution: Produces radioactive Uranium Waste when consumed.
Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

desc/cement.description:
Used for building.
Good for stable Foundations.

desc/space_elevator_part_12.description:
Project Part #12. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.
Power Usage: 0-2000 MW (1000 MW average).

Growth is the metric by which we measure success.

desc/drone_transport.description:
Transports available input back and forth between its home Port and destination Ports. Drone Status and other details can be viewed at a Drone's home Port.
Must be built on a Drone Port.

Has 9 inventory slots.

Can use any fuel type.
Refuels at any of its connected Ports if possible.

desc/computer.description: A complex logic machine that is used to control advanced behavior in other machines.

desc/fluid_canister.description: Used to package fluids for transportation.

desc/packaged_ionized_fuel.description: Ionized Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

desc/packaged_sulfuric_acid.description: Sulfuric Acid, packaged for alternative transport.

desc/wat_2.description: A weird alien phenomenon. While the sphere appears liquid, it behaves like a solid and does not have any detectable mass. It seems to somehow interact with and have awareness of its environment.

desc/steel_ingot.description: Smelted from a combination of Iron Ore and Coal. Can be made into several parts used in building construction.

desc/fabric.description:
Used to craft equipment.
Flexible but durable fabric.

desc/plutonium_cell.description:
Plutonium Pellets encased in concrete.
Used to produce Plutonium Fuel Rods for Nuclear Power production.

Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average).
﻿Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

desc/space_elevator_part_5.description: Project Part #5. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

desc/xmas_ball_2.description: An ornament for making FICSMAS Decorations. A mildly pleasing blue.

desc/modular_frame.description:
Used for crafting.
A multipurpose building block.

desc/medkit.description:
Fully restores health when used.

The FICSIT Medicinal Inhaler can be produced from a variety of different ingredients.

desc:equipment/gasmask.description:
Allows pioneers to breathe normally in toxic gas-filled areas.
Consumes Gas Filters from the pioneer's inventory when in use.

desc/crystal_shard.description:
Power Slug mucus compressed into a solid crystal-like shard. 
It radiates a strange power.

desc/cable.description:
Used for crafting.
Primarily used to build Power Lines.

desc/diamond.description:
Synthetic Diamonds produced by exposing Coal to extreme heat and pressure.

Used in the production of Time Crystals and Dark Matter Crystals.

Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average).

desc/hatcher_parts.description:
The shell-like remains of an alien... thing.
Used for MAM research.

desc/xmas_branch.description: This FICSMAS Tree Branch is very different from regular tree branches: it's used to produce parts and buildings during the FICSMAS event, rather than for combustion.

desc/tractor.description:
Picks up and delivers resources at Truck Stations. This process can be automated. Nicknamed 'Sugarcube' by FICSIT pioneers with the justification “It’s pretty sweet, y’know”.

Has 25 inventory slots and a built-in Crafting Bench.

Fuel: Any fuel type

desc/nuclear_waste.description:
The by-product of consuming Uranium Fuel Rods in a Nuclear Power Plant.
Non-Fissile Uranium can be extracted. Handle with caution.

Caution: HIGHLY Radioactive.

desc/mycelia.description:
Used for crafting.
Biomass Burners and vehicles can also use Mycelia for power.

desc/packaged_rocket_fuel.description: Rocket Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

desc/steel_plate.description: Primarily used when constructing slightly more advanced buildings.

desc/alien_power_fuel.description:
This intricate condensed-matter matrix is used to enhance the output of the Alien Power Augmenter.

Initially developed in efforts to create a human-made Somersloop, the Alien Power Matrix cannot sustain the extra-dimensional energy connection on its own. However, it can effectively stabilize the energy stream of the Somersloop.

desc/leaves.description:
Primarily used as fuel.
Biomass Burners and vehicles can use Leaves for power.

desc/pressure_conversion_cube.description: Converts outgoing force into internal pressure. Required to contain unstable, high-energy matter.

desc/wat_1.description: An odd alien object with a mind-bending, yet somehow familiar shape. It emits an unsettling energy.

desc:equipment/rifle.description: A long-range, rapid-fire weapon. Specifically designed to deliver adequate performance within the designated work area.

desc:equipment/stun_spear.description: A heavy self-defense electroshock melee weapon.

desc:equipment/nobelisk_detonator.description: A remote-control device used to handle and detonate Nobelisks.

desc/packaged_alumina.description: Alumina Solution, packaged for alternative transport.

desc/fuel.description: Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

desc/raw_quartz.description: Can be processed into Quartz Crystals and Silica, which both offer a variety of applications.

desc/plutonium_pellet.description:
Produced in the Particle Accelerator through conversion of Non-fissile Uranium.
Used to produce Encased Plutonium Cells for Plutonium Fuel Rods.

Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average).
Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

build/railroad_end_stop.description:
Prevents trains from derailing at the end of a railway.

While automated driving systems have made Buffer Stops mostly obsolete, their use is still recommended to mitigate potential human error.

build/inverted_ramp_u_corner_concrete_8_.description:
Provides a flat floor to build your factory on.

build/portal.description:
Enables pioneer teleportation between two linked Portals.

Each Portal can only have a single link. 
A link can only be made between a Main and Satellite Portal.

Singularity Cells need to be supplied to the Main Portal and will be consumed to establish and maintain the Portal link.

WARNINGS:
- Massive power draw will occur during start-up and usage.
- Power draw on use increases with travel distance.
- Link start-up will take time. Letting the connection expire is not recommended.
- Failure to deliver sufficient Singularity Cells will cause the link to expire.
- FICSIT does not condone the use of wormhole technology. Any usage of wormhole technology is at the user's own risk.
